title: Calculating a discounted price
problem: A jacket costs $\$150$ and is discounted by 20%. Find the sale price.

steps.instruction: Write the discount rate as a decimal.
Subtract the discount rate from 1 to find the multiplier.
Multiply the original price by the multiplier.

title: Converting currency using an exchange rate
problem: The exchange rate is $1 \text{ AUD} = 0.72 \text{ USD}$. A traveller converts $\$1200$ AUD to USD. How many USD will they receive?

steps.instruction: To convert AUD to USD, multiply the AUD amount by the exchange rate.

title: Hire purchase cost and interest as a percentage of the cash price
problem: A laptop has a cash price of $\$1600$. On hire purchase, there is a 15% deposit and 24 monthly repayments of $\$70$. Calculate the total hire purchase cost and express the extra amount paid as a percentage of the cash price, correct to 2 decimal places.

steps.instruction: Add the deposit and total repayments to find the total hire purchase cost.
Find the extra amount paid compared with the cash price.
Express the extra amount as a percentage of the cash price.

answer: Total hire purchase cost $= \$1\,920$; extra paid as a percentage of the cash price $= 20\%$.
